name: UndefinedCurveDirectionException
summary: The UndefinedCurveDirectionException class represents an error when, cannot make inward/outward curve check.

constructors.name: UndefinedCurveDirectionException
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the UndefinedCurveDirectionException class with "Cannot make inward/outward curve check" error message.
